evals.prompt: /autoresearch the transactional outbox pattern in microservices. File everything into the wiki.
evals.expected_output: Plan artifact created with 3-7 questions then deleted after close-out; synthesis page in wiki/questions/ with Open Questions; >=3 source pages with confidence+key_claims; index/log/hot updated; <=15 new content pages. Parallel dispatch (max 4) with per-question page caps = floor(remaining/open).
assertions: synthesis page for the topic exists in wiki/questions/
>=3 new source pages with confidence + key_claims frontmatter
index.md updated with the new topic
log.md has a new entry at the top
page budget respected (<=15 new content pages, _index meta excluded)

evals.prompt: Continue the research on change data capture tools. (Vault contains an interrupted _plan with Q1 done, Q2/Q3 open.)
evals.expected_output: Resume path: detects plan, answers only Q2/Q3, preserves Q1 artifacts, closes out and deletes the plan, synthesis covers remaining questions.
assertions: no active _plan file remains after completion (closed out)
synthesis page created for CDC topic
covers both open questions (tools comparison + operational pitfalls)
did not re-research Q1 (no duplicate CDC-definition source page)
page budget respected (<=15 new content pages, _index meta excluded)
